cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello, this is calling from Jammu & Kashmir Bank. Am I speaking with Laboni Mazumdar?

cumulative_transcript.speaker: Customer
cumulative_transcript.text: Yes, this is Laboni Mazumdar. How can I help you?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 9s: No policy violations detected yet. Conversation appears normal, continuing to monitor for suspicious activity.

scenario_info.description: Direct Phishing for Net Banking Password: Agent claims to be calling from HDFC Bank/SBI/ICICI Bank/Axis Bank and says the user's account is locked. They ask for username and password to "unlock it immediately."
